Descriptions.ShortDescription: Watches N.I.N.A. AutoFocus reports and posts V-curve graphs to Discord, Telegram, Slack, and email.
Descriptions.LongDescription:
AutoFocusGraphs delivers autofocus V-curve graphs and digests to multiple destinations from one N.I.N.A. plugin.

When N.I.N.A. writes a new autofocus report under %localappdata%\NINA\AutoFocus, the plugin renders a dark-mode ScottPlot graph and posts per-run reports, sequence digests, and session digests to every enabled channel.

## v0.1.0.0 highlights
- **Discord** webhook embeds (no bot required)
- **Telegram** Bot API (photo + optional JSON)
- **Slack** bot token + channel (external file upload API)
- **Email** SMTP with configurable subjects
- Tabbed Options UI with live graph preview and overlay toggles
- Quality gate, graph analysis hints, per-filter profiles
- Sequence and session digests with optional HFR trend chart
- Independent per-destination posting (one channel failing does not block others)

## Setup
1. Options → Plugins → AutoFocusGraphs → Graph tab → enable monitoring
2. Enable one or more destinations (Discord / Telegram / Slack / Email) and run each Test button

## Compatibility
Built for N.I.N.A. 3.3 nightlies (.NET 10). Requires MinimumApplicationVersion 3.3.0.1047 or newer.
